creator: mi@mail.virtual-estates.net
text:
Invoked with unknown symlink

Fix: 

After install
		cd /usr/local/bin
		mv pgp_old pgpo

	Fixing the port seems easy, but I'm not sure if this is a port or the
	original software bug -- older versions used pgpo.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install the port. Then try pgpo -- unknown command. Then -- try pgp_old
	and see the "Invoked with unknown symlink"
